channel.title: Pages on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: L Shaped Compact Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 108 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?

item.title: Double Galley Kitchen Ideas
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 149 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Floor Heating Cables: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design.

item.title: L Shaped Kitchen and Countertop
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 344 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Floor Heating Cable: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design.

item.title: L Shaped Open Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Exposed Concrete Floor (New Pour) Subfloor: Newly Poured Indoor Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 169 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Slab Heat Cables: “Are you considering installing heated concrete floors in your home? Even if you aren’t building a new home, perhaps you’re thinking about adding a sunroom or garage to your house.

item.title: Small L Shaped Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 86 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.title: About Us
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Earnesty Guaranteed KRI is your online destination for kitchen design. Each how-to blog post and every image we feature has been carefully curated to bring the very best award-winning kitchen design to our viewership. We strive to be the authority within our respected industry and we find ourselves constantly learning and growing each day.

item.title: Contact Us
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: We’d love to hear from you! Our site is meant to be a guide for new products and innovative ideas. Please fill out the form below and we will be in contact with you shortly. However, because of the high volume of questions we get, we do not have a chance to answer every individual question about kitchen remodeling!

item.title: Design Gallery
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen 9 drb8 qw Kitchen cnjrag8 Kitchen cs8 e3 zs Kitchen and kitchen table in the house 45 eunt4 Kitchen utensils hanging in kitchen nng8 bys Scandinavian style kitchen wall lk3 rbx6

item.title: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 215 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.title: U Shaped Lake House Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Engineered Wood Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 208 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Environ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet*, laminate and floating wood. The mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.

It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.title: Kitchen and Kitchen Nook
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Glued Hardwood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 452 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: WarmlyYours Environ Easy Mats: “Add extra warmth and comfort to carpet, laminate and floating wood flooring with a WarmlyYours Environ Easy Mats™ under floor radiant heating system. Easy Mats are perfect for heating large areas easily and quickly, with no need for cuts and turns.
